metadata.name: Gift Loyalty Points for Service Recovery

description: After resolving a guest's complaint, a manager decides to gift them some loyalty points as a gesture of goodwill.

nodes.task_description: Look up the guest's loyalty account.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the guest's account.

nodes.task_description: Manually adjust the guest's point balance, adding the gifted points.

expected_outcome.value: 5,000 points are added to the guest's account.

nodes.task_description: Add a note to the transaction explaining it was for service recovery.
